description: PRISMA-ScR-style data funnel for the SCLib superconductivity scoping review. Counts are extracted from the frozen public API snapshot and used to render the manuscript flow diagram.

stages.label: Records identified from arXiv via SCLib ingest
Records retained after 1996-2025 complete-year window filter
stages.source: Year filter applied to SCLib papers; out-of-window papers retained in corpus but excluded from yearly statistics
stages.excluded_reason: Outside complete-year analysis window (pre-1996 or post-2025 partial year)

stages.label: Raw material-paper-condition records emitted by LLM-assisted NER pipeline
Curator-approved, non-skeleton canonical materials in default public view
stages.source: SCLib /materials public endpoint after deduplication and needs_review suppression
stages.excluded_reason: Duplicate formula/family/phase, needs_review (implausible Tc, ambiguous formula, low extraction confidence), or skeleton entries

stages.label: Public SCLib timeline points (theoretical + experimental, 1996-2025)
stages.source: Projection of curated materials onto yearly timeline, restricted to complete-year window

stages.label: Experimental-only timeline points (full corpus, 1994-2026)
stages.source: Experimental-only filter applied to timeline points across full corpus window

stages.label: Experimental-only timeline points inside 1996-2025 analysis window
stages.source: Experimental-only filter intersected with complete-year window; underlies experimental envelopes in Section 3

notes: Each funnel stage discards a distinct artifact class: ingestion noise, repeated measurements, unreviewed formulas, and theoretical predictions.
The Tc-band structure reported in the manuscript is robust to each of these reductions in turn.
Counts are sourced from analysis_outputs/2026.05.13/data_funnel.json and run_summary.json.
